title: interior designer/ Drafter
description:
Careers at Interior Kaki

Build With Purpose. Grow With Intention. Full Time job- you can choose to be Salary Paid or commission based or a hybrid.

Interior Kaki is the sister company of Contractor Kaki Pte Ltd, established as a design-led interior practice where design intent and craftsmanship are conceived and executed under one roof. With our own in-house carpentry workshop and curated showroom, we take a hands-on approach to creating spaces that reflect the signature identity, lifestyle, and sensibility of each homeowner — thoughtfully resolved within the architectural realities of the home.

Our work sits at the intersection of design, buildability, and human experience. We believe in doing things properly — with care, discipline, and respect for the craft.

Why Join Interior Kaki

As the studio continues to grow, we are looking for driven, disciplined, and design-minded individuals who want more than just a job.

Interior Kaki is for those who:

  • Take pride in precision and craftsmanship

  • Are motivated to turn creative ambition into built reality

  • Value learning, accountability, and professional standards

  • Seek meaningful work and long-term career growth

We don’t simply fill roles. We invest in people.

Our Culture & Philosophy

We believe creativity takes many forms — and that talent flourishes when given the right platform, guidance, and freedom, supported by strong standards.

At Interior Kaki:

  • Ideas are respected

  • Skills are sharpened through real responsibility

  • Growth is nurtured through close collaboration

  • Individuals are encouraged to develop their own strengths and voice

We place greater emphasis on the growth of the individual than on the growth of the company alone — because when our people succeed, the studio grows naturally with them.

Who You’ll Work With

You will work closely with a team of experienced designers and alongside the founder herself, Kiren Pak.

Kiren is trained at Temasek Polytechnic in Product & Industrial Design, and further qualified through the BCA Academy in Interior & Landscape Design and Building / Facility Management. Her multidisciplinary background bridges creativity with buildability, regulatory understanding, and operational rigour.

Interior Kaki is intentionally structured to grow with depth, not just scale. Senior professionals are brought in not only to deliver excellence, but to mentor, collaborate, and elevate the studio as a whole.

Job Scope (General)

Depending on your role and level of experience, your responsibilities may include:

Design & Project Execution

  • Assist in or lead interior design development, space planning, and detailing

  • Prepare drawings, material selections, and specifications aligned with design intent

  • Coordinate with in-house carpentry, suppliers, and contractors to ensure buildability

Client & Stakeholder Management

  • Participate in client meetings, presentations, and discussions

  • Manage expectations through clear communication and professional conduct

  • Support project coordination from concept through completion

Technical & On-Site Exposure

  • Gain hands-on exposure to site conditions, carpentry works, and construction processes

  • Learn technical coordination, detailing accuracy, and on-site problem-solving

  • Ensure design intent is carried through during execution

Teamwork & Studio Contribution

  • Work closely with designers, project teams, and management

  • Contribute ideas, improvements, and solutions within the studio

  • Uphold Interior Kaki’s standards in quality, discipline, and professionalism

What You’ll Learn & Master

At Interior Kaki, you will be trained to operate with increasing independence, building both design sensitivity and technical competence over time.

You will gain hands-on experience in:

  • Interior design development and detailing

  • Technical coordination and buildability awareness

  • Client communication and relationship management

  • Team collaboration and project coordination

Learning happens daily through real projects, accountability, and problem-solving.
Additional technical and design training is available beyond standard working hours for those committed to deepening their expertise and accelerating their growth.

postedCompany.description:
Interior Kaki is a sister company of Contractor Kaki Pte Ltd. At Interior Kaki, we have our own carpentry and shop front to serve our client in creating the Signature Vibe of the owner in their personel space within the house dimension. We are currently expanding the team to have talented Individual whom want to live their dream up with us!


We believe in everyone is talented and creative in their own ways and need a platform and freedom to showcase it. We would love to walk that journey with you. 


Contractor Kaki Pte Ltd is bulit up with the efforts of the company team and the Key Person- Kiren Pak. She is trained in Product & Industrial Design as her main foundation- her materials and carpentry knowledge was built from then in her Poly days. Further working into the industry- she completed her addtional studies in BCA- Interior & Landscape design and her Diploma in Facility Management. Direct SG Contractor is a BCA- Registered Company. Together with Direct SG Contractor, we also bulit Interior Kaki- Product & Interior & Carpentry Services and Builder Kaki-BCA Builder Class 2 License.

At Interior Kaki we emphasize on the beauty of the design and the engineering that creates funtional yet athestic masterpiece for the end user. Whichever space we design we design for Human and not the space! We loves to work with creative mind or anyone whom is interested to learn regardless of race, age or even sexes.  we loves to share our skills and knowledge to those whom want to build this trade as there main career. At here- you can learn and grow and master whatever you want. Come join us!
postedCompany.name: INTERIOR KAKI PTE. LTD.
